name: LORE Theme
description: A premium, fandom-inspired storefront theme for LORE — movie and TV show accessories.
author: LORE Brand

fields.label: Primary Color
fields.info: Used for buttons, badges, and key highlights. Maps to --primary CSS variable.

fields.label: Background Color
fields.info: Main page background (cream/beige). Maps to --background CSS variable.

fields.label: Accent Color
fields.info: Secondary highlight color (lavender). Maps to --accent CSS variable.

fields.label: Text Color
fields.info: Main body text color. Maps to --foreground CSS variable.

fields.label: Heading Font
fields.info: Used for section titles and product names.

fields.label: Body Font
fields.info: Used for descriptions, labels, and UI text.

fields.label: Container Width
fields.info: Maximum width of the content container.

fields.label: Card Border Radius
fields.info: Border radius applied to product cards and UI elements.

fields.label: Hero Tagline
fields.info: Small label displayed above the hero headline.

fields.label: Hero Headline
fields.info: Main hero heading. Supports basic HTML.

fields.label: Hero Subtext
fields.default: Premium accessories inspired by iconic pop culture. Elevated design meets the fandoms you love.
fields.info: Supporting text shown below the headline.

fields.label: Section Heading
fields.info: Heading displayed above the best sellers product grid.

fields.label: Section Subtext
fields.default: The pieces everyone is talking about.
fields.info: Italic subtitle shown under the best sellers heading.

fields.label: Number of Products
fields.info: How many best seller products to display.

fields.label: Footer Brand Tagline
fields.default: Elevated accessories inspired by the stories we love. Premium quality, curated designs.
fields.info: Brand tagline shown in the footer beside the logo.

fields.label: Newsletter Heading
fields.info: Newsletter section heading in the footer.

sections.name: Hero Banner
sections.description: Full-screen hero with headline, subtext, and CTA buttons.

sections.name: Brand Story Banner
sections.description: Full-width quote block with brand story excerpt.

sections.name: Best Sellers
sections.description: Product grid for best selling items.

layouts.name: Default Layout
layouts.description: Base layout with sticky Navbar and Footer. Used by all pages.

notes: This theme is built as a React/Vite preview for Salla.
All product data in src/data/products.ts maps to Salla product variables.
CSS custom properties in src/index.css map to the settings defined above.
Each file in src/sections/ corresponds to one Salla theme section.
Replace static data with Salla Liquid template variables when migrating.
